allow: Bash(git add .dockerignore .env.example .gitignore Dockerfile.api Dockerfile.web README.md docker-compose.yml package.json pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json turbo.json apps/ packages/ .github/ helm/)
Bash(pnpm --filter api add @nestjs/typeorm typeorm pg @nestjs/jwt @nestjs/passport passport passport-jwt passport-local bcrypt)
Bash(npm exec -- pnpm --filter api add @nestjs/typeorm typeorm pg @nestjs/jwt @nestjs/passport passport passport-jwt passport-local bcrypt)
Bash(npm exec -- pnpm add tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer)
Bash(npm exec -- pnpm --filter web add clsx tailwind-merge class-variance-authority lucide-react radix-ui tw-animate-css)
Bash(npx shadcn@latest add button input label card badge table dialog select alert separator --overwrite)
Bash(npm exec -- pnpm --filter web add shadcn)

Bash(git add apps/web/app/api/[...path]/route.ts apps/web/lib/api.ts apps/api/src/seed/seed.service.ts apps/api/src/seed/seed.module.ts apps/api/src/app.module.ts apps/api/.env.example docker-compose.yml helm/suresend/templates/configmap.yaml helm/suresend/templates/deployment-web.yaml helm/suresend/templates/secret.yaml helm/suresend/values.yaml)
